name: MINH THUAN
bio: A software engineer from Gia Lai, Vietnam, with 3+ years building web products end to end.
highlights: Backend-focused: scalable APIs in .NET & Spring Boot — Clean Architecture, CQRS, RBAC
Solid data layer with PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Redis & EF Core
Full-stack & mobile delivery using React, Vue, Angular & React Native
Security-minded: JWT auth, per-user data ownership & rate limiting
Clean, maintainable code with pragmatic AI integration into real products
goal: Looking to grow into a strong backend engineer on a team building products with real impact.
